content: Just as intrinsic curiosity mechanisms (ICM/RND) shape what an autonomous agent chooses to learn, the 2024-2025 SOTA wave of active learning agent memory can be reimagined as a 'curiosity-weighted memory pruning' system, where only unexpected, curiosity-triggered experiences are retained long-term instead of all interaction data. This shifts active memory design from prioritizing task-relevant information to prioritizing information that sparks the agent's intrinsic exploration drive.
